parameters-en.Gain: Controls the amount of gain applied to the signal, which influences the level of distortion.
parameters-en.Bright: Selects the Input jack configuration--Normal (Off) or Bright (On).
parameters-en.Contour: When on, acts as a "mid-scoop", reducing the midrange frequencies while boosting the low and high frequencies.
parameters-en.Master: Controls the Master Volume of the amplifier.
parameters-en.Level: Controls the overall level of the Amp block. Unlike Master Volume, it has no effect on the block's tone.
parameters-en.62.5 Hz: Boost or cut up to 15.0 dB.
parameters-en.125 Hz: Boost or cut up to 15.0 dB.
parameters-en.250 Hz: Boost or cut up to 15.0 dB.
parameters-en.500 Hz: Boost or cut up to 15.0 dB.
parameters-en.1 kHz: Boost or cut up to 15.0 dB.
parameters-en.2 kHz: Boost or cut up to 15.0 dB.
parameters-en.4 kHz: Boost or cut up to 15.0 dB.
